description: Composition Peach scooped neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck and chest print Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Do you consider yourself the queen of fashion and do your friends know you for setting trends for others to follow? Show off your love the lee style with this bright t-shirt from lee and let the world notice you again and again. Pair this tee with denims and slip-on shoes a girlie look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
